value_chain_position: Cross-border consumer remittance rails — sells a mobile-first digital transfer service for immigrants sending money to family in emerging markets; the payment network layer between US/EU and EM corridors.
relative_comps: RELY is the fastest-growing scaled digital remittance player with 36% 3-year CAGR and 27% YoY on $1.7B revenue, 15% FCF margin. It competes against Western Union (WU) — the incumbent with massive agent network — and WISE.L which serves a different (higher-income) demographic. RELY's differentiation is mobile-first UX targeting immigrant senders, not businesses. Load-bearing score is 2 because remittance rails are inherently competitive (low switching cost, price-sensitive) — RELY's moat is brand, speed, and corridor economics, not exclusive infrastructure. The growth runway is large but margins are thinner than true toll-taker fintechs.
